frontend: Next.js App Router + React + Radix Themes + app-owned product UI components
storage: SQLite durable store for conversation threads, uploaded datasets, local demo data-source connections, agent instructions, field mappings, repair patches, match groups, unit conversions, price basis packs, workflow tasks, institution drafts, provider runs, and run events
real_data_source: Synthetic/desensitized 医药价格治理 uploaded tables and local demo data-source events: platform/listed price changes, selected prices, institution execution-price returns, historical prices, package/unit ambiguity, catalog aliases, unresolved follow-ups

real_data_sources.name: csv_xlsx_upload_context
real_data_sources.evidence: Upload/connect is the context path; built-in business prompt drives the agent run

deployment: local dev for G3, public deploy later via Cloudflare Pages or Vercel after reality review

deploy.reason: simple public judge URL for a Next.js product surface

live_provider_smoke.evidence: .hunter/live-provider-smoke.json and .hunter/agent-runs.json with two distinct /workspace provider-backed runs, data context, generated objects, needs-user question, and follow-up task changes

no_wallet_exception: This is a server-issued 医药价格治理 workflow state product, not Web3/ZK/chain. Users do not own, mint, trade, pay, attest, or sign an onchain result.
sponsor_technology_not_applicable_reason: The contest primitive is 医保 domain data/rules and Agent orchestration rather than a named SDK; price governance sources and state transitions are core.
tailwind_rejection: Tailwind-only or default shadcn would look like a generic admin shell; use app-owned conversation, data-source, generated-object, and workflow-task components.
visual_differentiation_note: conversation-first price governance workbench with upload/connect context and built-in business prompts, not a CSV upload audit, fixed button batch tool, report generator, evidence desk, or command center
forbidden_lookalikes: CSV upload homepage, fixed one-button audit surface, all-row table hero, red/yellow/green abnormal ranking, trend dashboard, evidence/proof wall, AI-purple landing page
qr_mobile_access_plan: QR opens renewed workspace thread with prompt chips and generated tasks
mobile_primary_flow: conversation, prompt chips, data-source context, generated tasks/drafts, needs-user question
desktop_parity_plan: desktop and mobile keep same conversation state, generated objects, workflow tasks, drafts, clarification, and provider failure boundaries
non_tailwind_visual_signature: conversation composer, prompt chip rail, data-source cards, agent plan messages, generated object panel, workflow/draft previews
delivery_mode_reason: Final contest requires live system operation and defense; materials should tell the product story while the app remains runnable.
why_this_stack: Next.js gives server-side provider boundaries, Radix gives accessible product controls, and SQLite supports judge-visible durable Agent state without adding deployment risk.
